description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu Docker image as the global default. Add a job named job2 that runs in the default stage, overrides the image to perl, and executes the command cat /etc/*release. Add a job named test_it that also runs in the default stage, uses the ruby image, and runs cat /etc/*release. The pipeline does not define any additional stages, caches, artifacts, services, or rules, so the jobs run on every pipeline execution.
